name: cybertoji-xmd-bot
description: CyberToji XMD - Advanced WhatsApp Bot by Lord Dev Dostoevsky 🇭🇹

scripts.start: npm install --legacy-peer-deps --silent && pip3 install yt-dlp --quiet --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || pip install yt-dlp --quiet 2>/dev/null || true && npx -y cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:2003 &> /tmp/tunnel.log & sleep 8 && node index.js

author: Lord Dev Dostoevsky
